name: Goodspeed, Wm.
description: He's known to all on college hill.
text: He's known to all on college hill.

name: Grover, Clyde
description: I've searched research and researched search Till research search is but research.
text: I've searched research and researched search Till research search is but research.

name: Pearl, Nielson
description: A quiet lass all modesty, Her work in class of high degree.
text: A quiet lass all modesty, Her work in class of high degree.

name: Ferd, E. Alder
description: To the young he is always giving advice and attempting to lead them in ways most precise.
text: To the young he is always giving advice and attempting to lead them in ways most precise.

name: Brice, Mcbride
description: His success is due to grit interspersed with Irish wit.
text: His success is due to grit interspersed with Irish wit.

name: Agren, Rose Ellen
description: Aside from a student of very high rank, she also instructs with methods most frank.
text: Aside from a student of very high rank, she also instructs with methods most frank.

name: Ellertsen, Jesse N.
description: Commercial in instinct and business in tone, We think he is equal to holding his own.
text: Commercial in instinct and business in tone, We think he is equal to holding his own.

name: Grandison, Gardner
motto: "All that mathematics to retain Must take a most extensive brain."
text: "All that mathematics to retain Must take a most extensive brain."

name: Nelson, David J.
motto: "It's a business proposition, you'll often hear him say. He deals with no one living, in any other way."
text: "It's a business proposition, you'll often hear him say. He deals with no one living, in any other way."

name: Axel, Christensen
motto: "Resolved that all who graduate should marry first. Why should they wait."
text: "Resolved that all who graduate should marry first. Why should they wait."

name: Peterson, Nettie
description: This maiden's ambition isn't known yet, but we're sure of one thing: she's no suffragette.
text: This maiden's ambition isn't known yet, but we're sure of one thing: she's no suffragette.

name: Wilbur, Thain
description: One thing now is very clear: He'll become a financier.
text: One thing now is very clear: He'll become a financier.

name: Hobson, Ivan
description: Gymnosperms and bryophytes. His botanical delights.
text: Gymnosperms and bryophytes. His botanical delights.

name: Lynn, Andrus
description: A soldier boy with Alexander's will, He chose to major in the art of drill.
text: A soldier boy with Alexander's will, He chose to major in the art of drill.

name: Stevens, E. W.
description: We miss your happy grin. Come on back and help us win.
text: We miss your happy grin. Come on back and help us win.

name: Pond, W. L.
description: A social man of quiet mien Who holds his place where e'er he's seen.
text: A social man of quiet mien Who holds his place where e'er he's seen.

name: Laursensen, Ed.
description: Ted was an athlete of genuine sort. Alas, though, the poor boy has now lost his heart.
text: Ted was an athlete of genuine sort. Alas, though, the poor boy has now lost his heart.

name: Frew, Eugene
description: The literature of Animal Husbandry appeals to him as very fine.
text: The literature of Animal Husbandry appeals to him as very fine.

name: Reese, Mary N.
description: Always appearing blithe and gay. Never without something to say.
text: Always appearing blithe and gay. Never without something to say.

name: Stone, Merlin
motto: "At last he found a better school."
text: "At last he found a better school."

name: Oswald, Christensen
description: Along with his skill in wood sawing, he is up in mechanical drawing.
text: Along with his skill in wood sawing, he is up in mechanical drawing.

name: Afton, Parrish
description: With modesty her only fault we all have learned to cherish as the friend of all, a queen in any.
text: With modesty her only fault we all have learned to cherish as the friend of all, a queen in any.

name: Batt, Wm.
motto: He hitched his wagon to a star and now the star is his'n.
description: So if he sees you doing wrong, you're apt to land in prison.
text:
He hitched his wagon to a star and now the star is his'n.
So if he sees you doing wrong, you're apt to land in prison.

name: Stonewall, Jackson
motto: "Deeds of 'Stonewall' still remind us. We can rise to heights of fame. Graduating, leave behind us something more than just a name."
text: "Deeds of 'Stonewall' still remind us. We can rise to heights of fame. Graduating, leave behind us something more than just a name."

name: Pence, John O.
motto: "A house divided cannot stand"
description: Editorials and "frats" go hand in hand.
text:
"A house divided cannot stand"
Editorials and "frats" go hand in hand.

name: Chas. Mcgregor
description: Music of all kinds are at his command From grand opera down to our A. C. Dutch band.
text: Music of all kinds are at his command From grand opera down to our A. C. Dutch band.

name: Hillman, Genevieve
description: Languages: German, French and journalism. Interests: English, history, patriotism.
text: Languages: German, French and journalism. Interests: English, history, patriotism.

name: Preston, Thomas
description: What good to this man are laws of osmosis? He's much more at home with the girls of Sorosis.
text: What good to this man are laws of osmosis? He's much more at home with the girls of Sorosis.

name: Young, Ernest
motto:
"Bluffing my profession, arguing my rule
Proving to the profs and all, that I am no fool."
text:
"Bluffing my profession, arguing my rule
Proving to the profs and all, that I am no fool."

name: Clawson, Leo. B.
motto: "So serious he seems to be, He'd never dare to smile on thee."
text: "So serious he seems to be, He'd never dare to smile on thee."

name: May, Isaacson
description: The thing we all would like to know is why she cares so much for Zoo.
text: The thing we all would like to know is why she cares so much for Zoo.

name: Warnick, A. P.
motto: "It's good that we know it is only in fun that he tells of the wonderful things he has done"
text: "It's good that we know it is only in fun that he tells of the wonderful things he has done"

name: Bryant, Bullen
description: For queening he has a leaning, but if he would amount to much he must hasten towards graduation, get in and dig to beat the dutch.
text: For queening he has a leaning, but if he would amount to much he must hasten towards graduation, get in and dig to beat the dutch.

name: Amos, Griffin
description: Takes it easy never bold. Modest as in days of old.
text: Takes it easy never bold. Modest as in days of old.

name: Parley, Christensen
description: Wellsville is his second home Through its lanes he loves to roam.
text: Wellsville is his second home Through its lanes he loves to roam.

name: Osmond, Justesen
description: In Wellsville he doth advertise.
text: In Wellsville he doth advertise.

name: Allen, E. L.
motto: "That his from Murdock Why need we say, He heralds its greatness every day."
text: "That his from Murdock Why need we say, He heralds its greatness every day."

name: Ray, M. Madsen
description: We're sure that fame he will attain For he has study on the brain.
text: We're sure that fame he will attain For he has study on the brain.

name: Hales, G. R.
description: Perseverant and steady. For laurels quite ready.
text: Perseverant and steady. For laurels quite ready.

name: Christensen, Jack
motto: "Don't ask me why I talk so much, for what are tongue and voice and such."
text: "Don't ask me why I talk so much, for what are tongue and voice and such."

name: Reeder, Moses
description: History is not his all. He can play baseball.
text: History is not his all. He can play baseball.

name: Argyle, Horace
description: We have heard of surprises and horses called "dark" But just watch this lad, our botany shark.
text: We have heard of surprises and horses called "dark" But just watch this lad, our botany shark.

name: Gronway, R. Parry
motto: "They say I'm a joke but it's sure great to be the popular joke of the U. A. C."
text: "They say I'm a joke but it's sure great to be the popular joke of the U. A. C."

name: Martineau, C. F.
description: That misplaced eyebrow on his face is apt to bring about disgrace.
text: That misplaced eyebrow on his face is apt to bring about disgrace.

name: Hans, A. Christensen
description: A living example of benedict joys With advice for all of the unmarried boys.
text: A living example of benedict joys With advice for all of the unmarried boys.

name: Peters, Laura
description: She never has time for the things she would do. She's so busy, we wonder if she'll ever get through.
text: She never has time for the things she would do. She's so busy, we wonder if she'll ever get through.

name: Hagan, Harold R.
description: Genus, species, phylum too. Bring him pleasures ever new.
text: Genus, species, phylum too. Bring him pleasures ever new.

name: Woodside, Jean
description: She's Ivie's counterpart and skilled in the same art.
text: She's Ivie's counterpart and skilled in the same art.

name: Christensen, Archie
description: Beethoven and Wagner and Verdi have fed his musical soul with the true living bread.
text: Beethoven and Wagner and Verdi have fed his musical soul with the true living bread.

name: Sharp, John A.
description: However he's on the square. However small he's still all there.
text: However he's on the square. However small he's still all there.

name: Warnick, Effie
description: The ease with which she gets those A's is characteristic of her ways.
text: The ease with which she gets those A's is characteristic of her ways.

name: Snow, Joseph
motto: "Something all would like to know: How the mumps could land big Joe."
text: "Something all would like to know: How the mumps could land big Joe."

name: Hess, Geo. M.
description: Leader bold, nerve untold, known to every one. All confess, Prexy Hess, man behind the gun.
text: Leader bold, nerve untold, known to every one. All confess, Prexy Hess, man behind the gun.

name: Price, Ezra
description: Why wonder at his charming way? He hails from Paris City gay.
text: Why wonder at his charming way? He hails from Paris City gay.

name: Greenhalgh, Violet
description: A regular shark in English 10. A talented maid with both tongue and pen.
text: A regular shark in English 10. A talented maid with both tongue and pen.

name: Hart, Powell
motto: "I don't know what to make of 'Hart'"
description: What can farmers do with art.
text:
"I don't know what to make of 'Hart'"
What can farmers do with art.

name: Sorenson, Chas. J.
description: Every Monday he appears in Greenville with his pruning shears.
text: Every Monday he appears in Greenville with his pruning shears.

name: Smith, Ray
description: His queening days are a thing of the past. He has found his long lost love at last.
text: His queening days are a thing of the past. He has found his long lost love at last.

name: Ivins, Stanley S.
description: His prospects were bright, but sad to relate Queening came in to alter his fate.
text: His prospects were bright, but sad to relate Queening came in to alter his fate.

name: Baker, Wm.
description: When he has no idea to express, That he is sick will be a right good guess.
text: When he has no idea to express, That he is sick will be a right good guess.

name: Shelley, Percy
motto: "Grinding early, grinding late, To be in the lead when I graduate."
text: "Grinding early, grinding late, To be in the lead when I graduate."

name: Parkinson, Ben
description: High in stature, low in tone. Never seen except alone.
text: High in stature, low in tone. Never seen except alone.

name: Shaw, Mary
description: Will someone please tell me a good reason why a maiden like she is need ever be shy.
text: Will someone please tell me a good reason why a maiden like she is need ever be shy.

name: Anderson, A. P.
motto: "Even though I've had to grind, yet I've left the rest behind."
text: "Even though I've had to grind, yet I've left the rest behind."

name: Aaron, Bracken
description: His agricultural appetites have thrown him amid the husky Nephites.
text: His agricultural appetites have thrown him amid the husky Nephites.

name: Gilbert, Janson
description: Aspiring for fame in poetical ways. Has produced charming ballads and masterly plays.
text: Aspiring for fame in poetical ways. Has produced charming ballads and masterly plays.

name: Martin, L. Harris
description: Mexican, but not in heart. Better farming is his art.
text: Mexican, but not in heart. Better farming is his art.

name: Bacon, Reginald
description: Grinding out real "Student Lies" Making all so very wise.
text: Grinding out real "Student Lies" Making all so very wise.

name: Caine, Alf
motto: "Alas! Alas! it is not ours to be so popular among the girls as he."
text: "Alas! Alas! it is not ours to be so popular among the girls as he."

name: Bearnson, J. B.
description: Among the rising generation His ambitions found their germination.
text: Among the rising generation His ambitions found their germination.

name: Anderson, Hans P.
description: Is it natural to you or does it bring pain To study and study and study again.
text: Is it natural to you or does it bring pain To study and study and study again.

name: Ivy, Richardson
description: She was ever of a serious mind yet had a smile for all.
text: She was ever of a serious mind yet had a smile for all.

name: Bowen, J. E.
description: Dan Webster was weary, Pat Henry was slow, When compared with this man, he's a real Cicero.
text: Dan Webster was weary, Pat Henry was slow, When compared with this man, he's a real Cicero.

name: Abbet, Sells
motto: "I am a man more sinned against than sinning."
text: "I am a man more sinned against than sinning."

name: Knudson, Ethel
motto: "Who chooseth me shall get what many men desire."
text: "Who chooseth me shall get what many men desire."

name: Shirley, Daniels
motto: "Good nature and good sense must ever join."
text: "Good nature and good sense must ever join."

name: Walker, J. B.
motto: "If all of us had his spirit, what a credit to the school."
text: "If all of us had his spirit, what a credit to the school."

name: Leonard, Davidson
motto: "Still the wonder grew that one small head held all he knew."
text: "Still the wonder grew that one small head held all he knew."

name: John, Benson
motto: "Disguise our bondage as we will 'Tis woman, woman rules us still."
text: "Disguise our bondage as we will 'Tis woman, woman rules us still."

name: Humphrys, Caddie
description: Knows what she knows when she knows it.
text: Knows what she knows when she knows it.

name: Peterson, Othelia
motto: "Only a sweet and virtuous soul like seasoned timber never gives."
text: "Only a sweet and virtuous soul like seasoned timber never gives."

name: Vaughn, Haws
motto: "His beauty shall in these black lines be seen, And they shall live and he in them still green."
text: "His beauty shall in these black lines be seen, And they shall live and he in them still green."

name: Leroy, Tanner
motto: "Blessed be agriculture, if one does not have too much of it."
text: "Blessed be agriculture, if one does not have too much of it."

name: Cooper, Veda
description: She is as constant as the stars that never vary.
text: She is as constant as the stars that never vary.

name: Morrison, Alice
description: More in it than fair visage.
text: More in it than fair visage.

name: Russell, Packard
description: Whenever you see him his head is in a whirl, and all that it's over is only some girl.
text: Whenever you see him his head is in a whirl, and all that it's over is only some girl.

name: Knudson, J. Floyd
motto: "A college joke to cure the dumps."
text: "A college joke to cure the dumps."

name: Stewart, Horsley
description: Hard to tell whether he is reciting or bluffing, but we hate to spoil his graft.
text: Hard to tell whether he is reciting or bluffing, but we hate to spoil his graft.

name: Mouritsen, Emma
motto: "Do you not know I am a woman? When I think I must speak."
text: "Do you not know I am a woman? When I think I must speak."

name: Wolf, Eva
motto: "Her lips were as a spout to tumble pearls and diamonds out."
text: "Her lips were as a spout to tumble pearls and diamonds out."

name: Merlin, Sheets
motto: "The proper study of mankind is man."
text: "The proper study of mankind is man."

name: Wilford, E. Nielson
motto: "There is virtue in the midnight oil, my boy."
text: "There is virtue in the midnight oil, my boy."

name: Gardner, Robert
motto: "I've got all my faculties yet sound and bright."
text: "I've got all my faculties yet sound and bright."

name: Ione, Reese
motto: "A countenance in which did meet Sweet records, promises as sweet."
text: "A countenance in which did meet Sweet records, promises as sweet."

name: Merlin, Christensen
description: She is one of those people nobody knows anything mean about.
text: She is one of those people nobody knows anything mean about.

name: Albert, Dallof
motto: Some men are born to feast, not to fight.
text: Some men are born to feast, not to fight.

name: John, Finley
motto: "Chase me girls. I'm full of fun."
text: "Chase me girls. I'm full of fun."

name: Goldie, Faux
description: Always there to help when help is needed. A bundle of reliability.
text: Always there to help when help is needed. A bundle of reliability.

name: Florence, Chipman
motto: "Essence of sweetness."
text: "Essence of sweetness."

name: Barker, Nellie
motto: "And her modest answer and graceful air Show her wise and good as she is fair."
text: "And her modest answer and graceful air Show her wise and good as she is fair."

name: Parker, Sarah
description: A sweet attractive kind of grace.
text: A sweet attractive kind of grace.

name: Elder, Lillian
motto: "A merry heart maketh a cheerful countenance."
text: "A merry heart maketh a cheerful countenance."

name: Hansen, Hortense L.
description: Retiring, but to know her is to love her.
text: Retiring, but to know her is to love her.

name: Morris, D. Lowe
motto: "Still waters run deep."
text: "Still waters run deep."

name: Smith, Edwin
motto: "Not for himself but for the world he lives."
text: "Not for himself but for the world he lives."

name: Ostlund, Lillian
motto: "Nature was there so lavish of her store That she bestowed until she had no more."
text: "Nature was there so lavish of her store That she bestowed until she had no more."

name: Izene, Hovey
description: Dainty, debonair, delightful.
text: Dainty, debonair, delightful.

name: Taylor, Asel J.
description: Fire in each eye and paper in each hand, He reads, recites and maddens all the land.
text: Fire in each eye and paper in each hand, He reads, recites and maddens all the land.

name: Clinton, Kjar
description: A very modest and unassuming young man.
text: A very modest and unassuming young man.

name: Leroy, A. Wilson
motto: What other men dare I dare.
text: What other men dare I dare.

name: Gowers, Ray
motto: "None but himself can be his parallel."
text: "None but himself can be his parallel."

name: Hedvig, Bensen
motto: "Smiles and smiles and talks and smiles some more."
text: "Smiles and smiles and talks and smiles some more."

name: Allemann, Joseph G.
description: He is happy-go-lucky yet there with the goods.
text: He is happy-go-lucky yet there with the goods.

name: Thorp, Verne
description: A man with music in his soul.
text: A man with music in his soul.

name: George, Cahoon
motto: "I am monarch of all I survey."
text: "I am monarch of all I survey."

name: Fay, W. Lee
motto: Cheer up, even a hair casts a shadow.
text: Cheer up, even a hair casts a shadow.

name: Nuttal, Leonard
motto: "The course of true love never did run smooth."
text: "The course of true love never did run smooth."

name: Perry, Stephen C.
description: Nice looking young fellow, a free dispensary of counsel and advice.
text: Nice looking young fellow, a free dispensary of counsel and advice.

name: Jones, Earl T.
motto: "No maiden's arm is around this throne."
text: "No maiden's arm is around this throne."

name: Cotter, Clarence E.
motto: A lion among the ladies is a most dreadful thing.
text: A lion among the ladies is a most dreadful thing.

name: Rowe, Ross T.
motto: "Beware the fury of a patient man."
text: "Beware the fury of a patient man."

name: Christensen, W. N.
description: Courteous he is and lowly of service, there is nowhere a man so virtuous.
text: Courteous he is and lowly of service, there is nowhere a man so virtuous.

name: Humphrys, Asia
motto: "Not to know me argues yourself unknown."
text: "Not to know me argues yourself unknown."

name: Webb, Effie
description: Her voice was ever low and sweet. An excellent thing in woman.
text: Her voice was ever low and sweet. An excellent thing in woman.

name: Smith, David W.
motto: "He could songs make and well endyte"
text: "He could songs make and well endyte"

name: Martin, B. Peterson
motto: "The man o' independent mind."
text: "The man o' independent mind."

name: Huffaker, R. V.
description: Though there be intelligence, his face showeth it not, yea is an empty void.
text: Though there be intelligence, his face showeth it not, yea is an empty void.

name: Cook, Alfonso
motto: "And ever seemed busier than he was."
text: "And ever seemed busier than he was."

name: Williams, Hugh
motto: "A lion among the ladies is a most dreadful thing."
text: "A lion among the ladies is a most dreadful thing."

name: Tuttle, Lloyd
motto: "When God sorts out the weather and sends rain, why rain is my choice."
text: "When God sorts out the weather and sends rain, why rain is my choice."

name: Ruby Ostler
motto: "Those eyes, those eyes, how full of heaven they are."
text: "Those eyes, those eyes, how full of heaven they are."

name: Annet, Goodwin
motto: "Pretty and witty, wild, and yet gentle."
text: "Pretty and witty, wild, and yet gentle."

name: Butt, N. J.
motto: "Then he will talk—ye Gods, how he will talk (when ???)"
text: "Then he will talk—ye Gods, how he will talk (when ???)"

name: Mayer, Clifford A.
motto: A little learning is a dangerous thing.
text: A little learning is a dangerous thing.

name: Hodapp
motto: "A plain blunt man who loves his friends."
text: "A plain blunt man who loves his friends."

name: Stewart, Eugene F.
motto: "I must cut out this queening business. It will be the death of me."
text: "I must cut out this queening business. It will be the death of me."

name: Lawrence, Titus
motto: "None but the brave deserve the fair."
text: "None but the brave deserve the fair."

name: Bennion, Mary
description: Grace was in all her steps; heaven in her eyes. In every gesture dignity and love.
text: Grace was in all her steps; heaven in her eyes. In every gesture dignity and love.
